question: Why do subprocess agents ignore CLAUDE.md's report_issue.sh instruction when blocked by permissions? The agent tried 4 workarounds then gave up with a user-facing message instead of calling report_issue.sh as instructed.
context: Observed in agent run 20260324_165107_slef: agent blocked on Write tool 4 times, ended asking user to approve instead of reporting the blocking failure via report_issue.sh
